name: Interactive Task Alignment as a POMDP
summary: arXiv:2607.16412v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Current benchmarks for language models primarily evaluate execution on fully specified tasks. However, real user tasks are often ambiguous. Users arr...
description: arXiv:2607.16412v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Current benchmarks for language models primarily evaluate execution on fully specified tasks. However, real user tasks are often ambiguous. Users arrive with incomplete, exploratory, or even inconsistent goals, requiring the assistant to first determine the intended task before carrying it out. We study this problem as task alignment: the ability...
author: Andy Dai, Zexue He, Zhenyu Zhang, Alex Pentland, Jiaxin Pei
